creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
Hi, 

The suggest fix (NoDDC _and_ 16 BPP default depth) works.
(4.5-STABLE with XFree86-4.2.0 from ports). 

It still doesn't work out-of-the-box, though. 

A newbie is unlikely to get this fixed at all himself and will
probably install another OS. 

 

cheers,
Rainer
